mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in real retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term earnings revisions, producing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the coefficient on 3-month RSAFS growth is non-positive in walk-forward tests or if triggered top-quartile RSAFS growth produces below-median 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 0.5% lowers discount rates and supports equity valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.5% are not higher than unconditional 60-day returns, or if the hit rate for positive returns is below 50% over walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected corporate revenues and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 60% of instances following a >0.3pp 3-month UNRATE increase, or if the average triggered return exceeds the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation is high while FEDFUNDS remains below 1%, markets price future policy tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 12-month growth exceeds 5% and FEDFUNDS is below 1%
regime_hint: inflation shock with policy behind the curve
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-CPI low-FEDFUNDS state has non-negative average 60-day excess returns versus baseline, or if either single proxy alone explains the return effect with no interaction term significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving operating leverage and goods-sector earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after releases.
failure_condition: Reject if positive month-over-month INDPRO surprises or increases are followed by negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns, or if the walk-forward directional accuracy is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A material decline in housing starts signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% over 3 months or crosses below 1500
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Joint payroll expansion and rising retail sales indicate that income growth is translating into consumption, supporting revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS-RSAFS joint-positive state does not deliver higher 20-day returns than either series alone, or if its interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Low unemployment combined with high CPI creates an overheating signal that raises expected tightening risk, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4% and CPIAUCSL 12-month growth exceeds 5%
failure_condition: Reject if low-UNRATE high-CPI observations are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of cases, or if adding FEDFUNDS does not improve out-of-sample classification accuracy.
